renames.rationale: 13-insn thunk calling MSVC STL _Tidy_deallocate; likely container destructor/cleanup wrapper. No strings, no callers visible.
Strings 'key ' and "' not found" plus _CxxThrowException callee match the canonical std::map/unordered_map at()-style 'key not found' throw helper.
Calls _CxxThrowException + deallocate; shape matches MSVC allocator length_error/bad_alloc throw helper that frees buffer before throwing.
Sole callee __ArrayUnwind: SEH/EH cleanup funclet that destroys partially-constructed array on exception. Pure unwind helper.
Sole callee _seh_filter_exe: CRT SEH top-level exception filter wrapper used by /EHa to translate SEH into C++.
Sole callee ExFilterRethrow: MSVC C++ EH rethrow filter funclet emitted around rethrow inside a catch block.
Sole callee ExFilterRethrowFH4: FH4-format C++ EH rethrow filter (newer MSVC funclet variant of ExFilterRethrow).
8-insn funclet whose only callee is __FrameUnwindFilter: stack-frame unwind exception filter for C++ EH.
